evals.prompt: /apply-project-profile (valid project.json with all required fields, fresh workspace — no project.md, no always.md, CLAUDE.md has no project row yet)
evals.expected_output: Generates project.md with correct template, adds project.md row to CLAUDE.md, creates rules/config/always.md with frontmatter and Project Context section, shows structured confirmation.

assertions.text: project.md contains company name from project.json
CLAUDE.md Key References table has project.md row
always.md has YAML frontmatter with paths: "**/*"

evals.prompt: /apply-project-profile (project.json exists with isOnboardingCompleted: true but missing currentInitiatives)
evals.expected_output: Stops at Step 1, names the missing field explicitly, generates no files.

assertions.text: Stops with an error message (does not proceed to generate files)
Error message names the missing field 'currentInitiatives'

evals.prompt: /apply-project-profile (project.json valid, project.md already exists, CLAUDE.md already has project row, rules/config/always.md already has Project Context section)
evals.expected_output: Skips CLAUDE.md and always.md updates (no duplicates), regenerates project.md, completes successfully.

assertions.text: CLAUDE.md has exactly one project.md row (no duplicate)
always.md has exactly one '## Project Context' section (no duplicate)
